product.title: wet n wild Photo Focus Matte Face Primer - Partners in Prime
featureBullets: Matte finish helps to reduce shine
Extends makeup wear by preventing cracking, fading, or creasing
Contains Aloe Vera and Vitamin E
product.description: Remember when you were a kid, watching fairy tales, wishing you had a magic potion to transform yourself instantly into a glamorous princess? Well, were here to make your dreams come true! This miraculous primer can be used all over your face to minimize the appearance of pores, fill in fine lines and wrinkles, even out skin tone, prevent your foundation from caking, and brighten your complexion for ultra-vibrant color that lasts all day. Magic! How does it do this? Because we basically put diamonds in a bottle! No, really, we did. The key ingredient in this miracle primer is white sapphire, formulated into a smooth, silky cream that glides on effortlessly, leaving behind a crystal complexion. Just think of us as your fairy godmother!

specification.value: The wet n wild Photo Focus Matte Face Primer offers a lightweight formula with matte finish, helping to reduce shine and extend makeup wear by preventing cracking, fading, or creasing. It contains Aloe Vera Vitamin E, is gluten-free, vegan, cruelty-free, fragrance-free, paraben-free, oil-free.
#17,003 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #74 in Foundation Primers
Cruelty-Free, Vegan, Fragrance-Free, Paraben-Free, Gluten-free, Oil-free

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this primer to be an amazing product that provides a nice matte finish, silky smooth texture, and helps with facial shine. They appreciate its effectiveness and value for money, with one customer noting it competes well with high-end primers. The consistency receives mixed feedback - while some say it works well for oily skin, others find it too watery.

reviews.reviewTitle: Smooth, Lightweight, and Perfect for Makeup!
reviews.reviewText: I recently tried the wet n wild Photo Focus Matte Face Primer, and I'm impressed. The primer goes on smooth and lightweight, creating a perfect base for foundation without feeling greasy or heavy. It helps minimize pores and control shine, giving a matte finish that lasts throughout the day. Makeup applies more evenly and stays in place longer when I use this primer. It's also affordable, effective, and easy to blend, making it a great option for everyday use. Overall, this primer is high-quality, budget-friendly, and reliable - a must-have for anyone looking to keep their makeup fresh and flawless all day!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 12, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Perfect. Left my face a smooth palette for my makeup. I highly recommend this primer.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 24, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Doesn't keep makeup on very well but definitely makes it more matte. A little bit runny so be careful getting it out
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 26, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: No greasy all day stay or
reviews.reviewText: Love this stuff! Got it at a drug Store and been obsessed ever since. I can have this in for 12 plus hours and my make up never gets greasy! It’s so affordable I really like more than other expensive primers! It’s Super lightweight and feels like lotion and absorbs well and non greasy
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 10, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Very runny product, doesn’t cover your pores all too well, you would need to put a lot of it on. Half the bottle is full when you get it. Also you can feel it on your face because it dries up hard
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 26, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: it is both matte and a primer
reviews.reviewText: this product is not pretending to be anything it isn't. the austere packaging tells you everything you need to know. it is a primer, and it is matte. it looks, smells, and feels like elmer's glue. it somehow manages to be less viscous than water. if you are naive enough to try to turn the tube upside down to get your primer out you will end up with half the contents in your hand. it dries within seconds of it touching your face and leaves you feeling like fine-grained sandpaper. it does not fill in or smooth, in fact it makes any texture on your face look more pronounced than before. it does not hydrate, or brighten, or even your skin tone. but it does not promise to do these things. it does not promise to be comfortable or to be easy to use. it promises exactly two things: to be primer, and to be matte. and that it is.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 10, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Love love love !!!! Very lightweight and pore blurring! So affordable and one of my favorite primers.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 30, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: I received only half a tube of product.
reviews.reviewText: I purchased this product in hopes it would conceal some imperfections and work well with my foundation. However, when I received this product it was half full, I didn't return it. Not enough time to really give it a better review. Will I purchase another, probably not due to not being able to use a full tube to give a better review.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 3, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: The best I have ever used.
reviews.reviewText: This is the best primer I have ever used. My only complaint is that it only comes in a small size. It is everything it says on the tin.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on August 30, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Do buy for flawless finish of make up
My go-to primer. It's light on your face and helps to keep the shine away
